MELItem.Title: Forward Cargo Heat Supply Shutoff Valve

ListItem.Para: Valve is deactivated closed.
Forward EE cooling exhaust overboard vent valve is deactivated open.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-27-04.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the forward cargo heat supply shutoff valve closed and deactivate the forward equipment cooling exhaust overboard vent valve open (AMM DDG 21-43-01).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the forward cargo heat supply shutoff valve closed.

Effectivities.Effectivity: For Forward Cargo Compartment Air Conditioning (FCAC) installed:

ListItem.Para: Set (P5) FWD CARGO A/C switch OFF.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
SUPPLY SOV CLOSE-FWD CARGO
SUPPLY SOV OPEN- FWD CARGO
Gain access to the forward cargo heat supply shutoff valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLOSED position.
Deactivate forward equipment cooling exhaust overboard vent valve open.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
OVERBOARD VLV CL-FWD EQUIP CLG
OVERBOARD VLV OP-FWD EQUIP CLG

Note.Para: The EQUIP OVBD VENT VLV FWD status message may be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Gain access to forward equipment cooling exhaust overboard vent valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is fully OPEN.
Set (P5) FWD CARGO A/C switch OFF.
Forward cargo compartment heat is not available. Temperature sensitive cargo should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
Forward cargo ventilation is not available. Live animals should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details.
Set (P5) FWD CARGO A/C switch OFF.
Forward cargo compartment heat capability is degraded. Temperature sensitive cargo requiring heating should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
Forward cargo ventilation is not available. Live animals should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
